Unit: gr, Batch x1: 453, Batch x2: 906, Batch x3: 1359, Batch x4: 1812, Prep/Brand: Silver Cow
Pre heat oven to ~350°F, low fan
Dice up cold butter, add shallots and butter to a hotel pan and cover with aluminum foil
Roast in the oven for ~30 minutes or until the shallots are soft and beginning to lose water
Cool naturally or in a blast chiller, remove the shallots and chop into small dice for shallot marmalade production.
